item.title: US Senate backs Trump on Iran strikes, blocks bid to limit his war powers
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
Republicans hold slim majorities in both the Senate and House of Representatives.
Matched: law(+3), war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: 'Very relieved': Passengers on first Dubai-Singapore flight since Middle East war began recount stressful journey home
item.description:
Source: Channel NewsAsia (Global)
“We were very, very thrilled, very happy. Very grateful. We prayed every day," said a mother who welcomed her son back at Changi Airport.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: Singapore to launch AI tool to flag high-risk patients for heart screening
item.description:
Source: Channel NewsAsia (Global)
Doctors will be encouraged to use the new tool, which can predict a patient’s risk of developing diabetes or high cholesterol.
Matched: ai(+3), launch(+2), diabetes(+2)

item.title: Why Washington can’t stop Trump on Iran
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Trump has launched strikes on Iran while Congress debates war powers.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3), launch(+2)

item.title: Pentagon identifies two more soldiers killed in Iran war
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
The two soldiers died on March 1 in a drone attack on a US military facility in Port Shuaiba.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Canada’s PM Carney says can’t rule out military participation in Iran war
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
“We will stand by our allies,” said Mr Carney, adding that “we will always defend Canadians”.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: US says first charter flight takes Americans from war
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
The State Department has faced criticism for not providing quicker paths out of the Middle East.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Israel tightens siege on Gaza amid Iran war
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Israel closes Gaza crossings amid war with Iran, raising fears of famine. Tareq Abu Azzoum explains.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Iran live: Senate fails to curb Trump’s war powers; Israel pounds Lebanon
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
US and Israel bombard Iran as Israeli forces hammer Lebanon and the widening conflict causes energy prices to spike.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: US will ‘rain missiles’, ‘death and destruction’ on Iran, Trump aides say
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
US president says on a scale of one to 10, he would rate the war's success at 15, as Iran details civilian sites hit.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Venezuela mining reform coming soon, acting president says, as US official hails potential
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
March 4 - Venezuela's interim President Delcy Rodriguez said on Wednesday a reform of the country's main mining law will be submitted in coming days to the country's legislature, after a meeting in Caracas with U.S. Secretary of the Interior Doug Burgum, where the two officials hailed cooperation on minerals and a shared desire to pave the way for investment.
Matched: law(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Trump: US forces doing ‘very well on the war front’ in Iran
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
US President Donald Trump said if he had to rate his war on Iran from one to ten, he would give it a fifteen.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: US Senate fails to advance war powers measure to rein in Trump’s Iran war
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
In 47-52 procedural vote, a resolution to curtail Trump's powers was defeated, though a separate House vote is expected.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Iran launches missiles at Israel, no casualties reported
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
Matched: ai(+3), launch(+2)

item.title: Qatar evacuating residents near US embassy
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
Qatar’s interior ministry posted on X that the move is a "temporary precautionary measure".
Matched: ministry(+2), ai(+3)

item.title: Two men spied on Hong Kong dissidents in UK for China, London court told
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
The joint China-UK nationals are accused of targeting Hong Kong dissidents.
Matched: court(+2), ai(+3)

item.title: Apple launches lower-end $849 MacBook Neo, threatening Windows PC market
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
The release is a major shift for Apple, which has been reluctant for decades to launch a low-end Mac laptop.
Matched: ai(+3), launch(+2)

item.title: Ecuador declares Cuban ambassador 'persona non grata'
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
QUITO, March 4 - Ecuador declared Cuban Ambassador Basilio Gutierrez and his diplomatic staff \"persona non grata,\" the foreign ministry said on Wednesday, giving them 48 hours to leave the country.
Matched: ministry(+2), ai(+3)

item.title: Iran crisis tests Trump standing with young men who helped power 2024 win
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
MANCHESTER, New Hampshire, March 4 - When Michael Leary learned the United States had struck Iran, he questioned whether the move honored the \"America First\" pledge that earned his vote for President Donald Trump and feared it could pull the country into another Middle East quagmire.
Matched: ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: Traders mint money on betting platforms on US-Israel strike on Iran
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Anonymous bets hours before attacks on Iran that killed Supreme Leader Khamenei have raised concerns of insider trading.
Matched: economy(+2), ai(+3)

item.title: More than 200 killed in landslide at DRC coltan mine
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Congo’s Mines Ministry said about 70 children were among the victims.
Matched: ministry(+2), ai(+3)

item.title: Colorado Governor Polis signals he is open to clemency for Tina Peters
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
WASHINGTON, March 4 - Colorado Governor Jared Polis signaled on Tuesday he was willing to consider clemency for Tina Peters, a former state county clerk convicted of illegally tampering with voting machines as she pursued claims that the 2020 presidential election had been stolen.
Matched: election(+2), ai(+3)

item.title: US-Israeli attack on Iran: What happens next?
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
Iran’s Supreme Leader was killed, along with several key figures, in a series of attacks by the US and Israel since Feb 28. Who is in power now, and is a regime change possible?
Matched: ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: US sinks Iranian warship off Sri Lanka; NATO destroys missile heading for Turkey
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
The escalation came as the son of Iran’s slain supreme leader emerged as a front runner to succeed him.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)
